title: Backpacking Across Europe
content: For three months, Sophia traveled across Europe with nothing more than a backpack and a flexible itinerary. She visited famous cities, small villages, and places she had never heard of before reading about them online. Some nights she stayed in hostels, while others were spent on overnight trains or buses. Traveling light forced her to be practical and adaptable. Along the way, she met travelers from different countries who shared stories, recommendations, and occasionally meals. By the end of the journey, Sophia realized the people she met were just as memorable as the destinations themselves.
